x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A tool to copy a AWS DynamoDB table and optionally its content from an account to another.

options.name: source-profile
options.description: The profile to be used to access the source table.

options.name: source-region
options.description: The region where the source table is located.

options.name: source-service-url
options.description: The service url to be used to access the source table.

options.name: source-access-key
options.description: The access key to be used to access the source table.

options.name: source-secret-key
options.description: The secret key to be used to access the source table.

options.name: target-profile
options.description: The profile to be used to access the target table.

options.name: target-region
options.description: The region where the target table is located.

options.name: target-service-url
options.description: The service url to be used to access the target table.

options.name: target-access-key
options.description: The access key to be used to access the target table.

options.name: target-secret-key
options.description: The secret key to be used to access the target table.

options.name: settings-file-path
options.description: The path to a JSON file containing settings to be used.

options.name: clone-content
options.description: Specifies whether the content of the source table should be cloned in the target table. [default: False]
